name: Wallbox N.V.
description: Wallbox N.V. is a global technology company dedicated to changing the way the world uses energy. The company creates advanced electric vehicle charging and energy management systems that redefine the relationship between users and the network. Wallbox goes beyond electric vehicle charging to give users the power to control their consumption, save money, and live more sustainably. Wallbox offers a complete portfolio of charging and energy management solutions for residential, semi-public, and public use in more than 115 countries around the world.
